Windows IP Configuration

Ethernet adapter Ethernet:

   Media State . . . . . . . . . . . : Media connected
   Physical Address. . . . . . . . . : 00-11-22-33-44-55
   IPv4 Address. . . . . . . . . . . : 192.168.50.24(Preferred)

Ethernet adapter WireGuard Tunnel:

   Media State . . . . . . . . . . . : Media connected
   IPv4 Address. . . . . . . . . . . : 10.6.0.10(Preferred)
   IPv6 Address. . . . . . . . . . . : 2001:db8::1(Preferred)

PPP adapter Contoso Legacy VPN:

   Media State . . . . . . . . . . . : Media disconnected
